defs: The act or power of recalling past experience; the state of being reminiscent; remembrance; memory.
quotes: The other part of memory, called reminiscence, which is the retrieving of a thing at present forgot, or but confusedly remembered.
I forgive your want of reminiscence, since it is long since I saw you.

defs: That which is remembered, or recalled to mind; a statement or narration of remembered experience; a recollection; as, pleasing or painful reminiscences.
